title: Merlin DEX - REKT
relevance_summary: Liquidity pool draining via max approvals on Feeto address

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sets max approval on Feeto address after deploying liquidity pools

red_flags: max approvals granted to Feeto address
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that sets max approval on Feeto address after deploying liquidity pools
summary: Merlin DEX lost $1.8M due to a rug pull where attackers drained liquidity pools using max approvals on the Feeto address. A guard could have blocked such transactions.
